title: Fancy Hearts
description: This Resource pack improves the look of the health bar
body:
# Fancy Hearts Resource Pack

### Finding the heart textures outdated?, this is the texture pack for you!

Fancy Hearts changes the old heart textures to something new and more fitting for modern versions of Minecaft.

![heart textures normal & hardcore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ad286f97f6bd962cc177694e9b9d748284eed8.png)
